Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dude, what are you even DOING? That's not gonna work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei-san, could you please be quiet!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4104 0 0}...Sounds like tensions are running high.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Since we're essentially confined within an enclosed space, we should avoid such situations. Let's step in and mediate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}What's with all the commotion? Is there a problem?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Oh, uh... Nothing, really. No big deal. Ahaha... Hahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}Junpei-san was getting worked up because he can't beat this game.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Ah, you're referring to that object we found during our exploration? The {f 4 4 0 37 1 16780}, was it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Yep, that's the one! I was havin' a rough time tryin' to clear it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2123 0 0}Then Amada here was all like, "Let me handle this!" So I let 'im take over, but he wasn't even any better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}Because SOMEONE was being loud and distracting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4123 0 0}*sigh* So you two were arguing... over a game?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}No, seriously! You don't get it, this game is stupid hard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}It really is. How could anyone possibly beat it with Junpei-san screaming in their ear...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}There's no need to go that far, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}If this game is the source of your frustration, then this matter shall be put to rest once it's beaten, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Amada, I want you to move per my directions. First, fall back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4140 0 0}One, two, three... Now head to the right, don't stop. There's an opening ahead. You can't miss it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}...We won. We actually won. I can't believe it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}I didn't do anything particularly noteworthy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4063 0 0}Oh, it was nothing. I'm sure you could have done it just as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Remember: observe the enemy's positioning, then identify a weakness in their formation you can exploit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Once you've broken their defenses, they'll crumble, making it quite easy to wipe them out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Takin' out the weakest link first, huh... Seems kinda dirty, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Yeah? I mean, I know it's just a game, but at some point, I just felt sorry for 'em...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2124 0 0}Yeah, I get that, but... I dunno, it just feels bad steamrolling 'em like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}I can't say I agree. Would you still feel the same way when facing a real enemy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Perhaps this is a good opportunity to remind you all of the proper combatant mindset.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru-san seems to have steeled[n]her resolve after observing us...[n]{f 1 1}
